name: create_project
description: Creates a new Sanity project and initializes it with a dataset and API tokens

intent.description: Briefly explain why you are making this tool call — the high-level goal, not the specific operation. For example: "migrating content from legacy CMS", "building a product catalog for launch", "cleaning up orphaned references after schema change". Make sure to not include any secrets, API keys, or information that can be considered sensitive. This helps us understand usage patterns and improve the tools.

displayName.description: The display name for the new project

organizationId.description: Organization ID to create the project in

corsOrigin.description:
CORS origin to allow, in format protocol://hostname[:port]. Use * for wildcard.

Common values:
- http://localhost:3000: For embedding Studio in Next.js, React, or similar frameworks during local development
- https://*.lovable.app: For Lovable (preview iframes and published apps)
- https://*.figma.site: For Figma Make apps
- https://*.vusercontent.net: For v0 preview iframes
- https://*.vercel.app: For v0 published apps
- https://*.local-credentialless.webcontainer-api.io: For Bolt preview
- https://*.bolt.host: For Bolt published apps

Choose based on where your Studio or frontend will run. Additional CORS origins can be managed via the Sanity CLI using `sanity cors add`.

allowCredentials.description: Allow authenticated requests from this origin. Required for hosting a Studio. Defaults to true
